lines.name: Classical Center
lines.description: The strongest opening — X seizes the center, O contests from a corner, X develops the target board.

lines.name: Italian Game
lines.description: X opens center, O responds through an edge cell, creating open lines across the meta-board.

lines.name: King's Indian
lines.description: X develops a corner board first, O claims the center, then X re-enters the center board to contest.

lines.name: Fortress Defense
lines.description: After the center opening, X mirrors O's corner in the target board, trapping the opponent in one zone.

lines.name: Scandinavian
lines.description: A bold corner-to-corner start — X stakes a deep claim in one board, then transitions through the center.

lines.name: Hypermodern
lines.description: X develops from a corner, O seizes the center, then X strikes the opposite corner to create cross-board tension.
